entries.definition:
كتاب الزّاي

زول - زون

(زيت) الزاء والياء والتاء كلمةٌ واحدة، وهي الزّيت، معروف. ويقال زِتُّه، إذا دهنْتَه بالزّيت. وهو مَزْيوت.

being mindful of God.
زَاد zād [coll. n.] food provisions (in particular for a journey)
(2:197) وَتَزَوَّدُوا فَإِنَّ خَيْرَ الزَّادِ التَّقْوَى furnish yourselves with [the
necessary] provisions—indeed, the best provision [to take with
you in your journey to the Hereafter] is being mindful of God.
entries.definition_english:

(2:197) وَتَزَوَّدُوا فَإِنَّ خَيْرَ الزَّادِ التَّقْوَى furnish yourselves with [the

entries.definition:
z-y-t oil, particularly olive oil, to oil, to anoint; olives, olive
tree. Of this root, three forms occur seven times in the Qurʾan:

408
